name: ExamDost Type List Master Sheet (live Google Sheet)
_note: Single source of truth for the chapter/topic taxonomy. The sheet must be shared 'Anyone with the link -> Viewer' for the export URL to work. Do NOT rename the sheet tabs: xlsx export truncates tab names to 31 chars, which is where canonical names like 'Utilization of Electrical Energ' come from. Renaming a tab would break every existing tag.
